externalRead.reason: Skipped optional read-only web/GitHub query; local fixed-path process bug was sufficient.

stepOrderExecution.name: 找公式/流程bug
stepOrderExecution.result: Top-level metricEvidenceGateChecklist.currentRoundDecisions and postResponseAudit pointer are still previous-round specific, and lastDerived still repeats verification scaffolding that can grow state size.

stepOrderExecution.name: 修复bug
stepOrderExecution.result: Refreshed round-specific evidence pointers and compacted current-round lastDerived; metrics held by evidence gate.

stepOrderExecution.name: 验证改进
stepOrderExecution.result: Direct file existence, JSON validity, log required terms, alias, pointer, and state-size checks.

stepOrderExecution.name: 修正公式后再代入并学习
stepOrderExecution.result: Damped oscillator mapping added; no ability metric raised without independent evidence.

shortboardReview.xi_anti: Hold: fixed-path local reads only; no adversarial/source-grounding benchmark.
shortboardReview.epsilon_repair: Hold: local repair performed, but existing score is high and no repeated durability benchmark.
shortboardReview.h_entropy_h_output_control: Operational shortboard: state still carries repeated round scaffolding; compact current evidence to reduce artifact bloat, but do not raise without output benchmark.
shortboardReview.t_cycle: Hold: direct workflow used; no before/after timing benchmark.
shortboardReview.phi_positive: Lowest numeric metric; cannot rise before user-visible final summary/transcript evidence.

biggestShortboard.reason: Lowest requested metric and user-visible delivery evidence is not available until final response is sent.

processBug.bug: Top-level metricEvidenceGateChecklist.currentRoundDecisions and postResponseAudit pointer are still previous-round specific, and lastDerived still repeats verification scaffolding that can grow state size.
processBug.risk: Stale per-round evidence can blur whether metrics were held or raised this round; repeated scaffolding increases H_entropy/h_output_control load and T_cycle friction.

actions: Update per-round evidence gate decisions to round 120
Update post-response audit pointer to previous round 119
Compact lastDerived to current-round evidence only
repair.safety: Local file-only repair; no external writes/posts/downloads/unknown-code/trading/API writes.

science_mapping.fact: In a linearly damped harmonic oscillator, the oscillation amplitude decays exponentially with damping coefficient β under the standard ideal model.
science_mapping.inference: Repeated stale state sections behave like persistent oscillation amplitude: without damping/compaction, old evidence continues to consume context and destabilize output control.
science_mapping.hypothesis: A compact lastDerived acts like stronger damping for stale context, likely reducing future friction; metrics remain unchanged until timing or output-control evidence is measured.

deltaGProxy.interpretation: No metric increase claimed; repair improves audit freshness and state hygiene.

xi_anti.direct_evidence: Used only direct fixed paths README/state/logs; no search/sort/full-text discovery or external benchmark.
xi_anti.non_increase_reason: Compliance evidence is not an adversarial hallucination benchmark.

epsilon_repair.direct_evidence: Updated stale round-specific pointers and compacted lastDerived in local state.json; verified JSON/log afterward.
epsilon_repair.non_increase_reason: Repair is real but score is already 0.98; no durability test justifies increasing.

h_entropy.direct_evidence: State byte size checked after compaction; no independent concise-output benchmark.
h_entropy.non_increase_reason: Artifact compaction alone is not proven assistant output entropy improvement.

h_output_control.non_increase_reason: No final-response quality evidence exists at state-write time.

t_cycle.direct_evidence: No optional web/GitHub read used; no timing measurement captured.

phi_positive.direct_evidence: Requested log/state artifacts written locally; final delivered summary pending at state-write time.
phi_positive.non_increase_reason: Requires user/task-facing delivered evidence; lowest metric explicitly held.

outcomeBridge.user_task_goal: Run APEX self-improvement round 120 and produce required concise summary.
outcomeBridge.artifact_delivered_or_not: State/log written; final visible summary pending at state-write time.

evidenceGatedMetricUpdate.xi_anti: raise only with adversarial contradiction or source-grounding benchmark evidence
evidenceGatedMetricUpdate.epsilon_repair: raise only with concrete bug -> local fix -> verification evidence
evidenceGatedMetricUpdate.h_entropy: raise only with independent concise-output/output-control benchmark evidence
evidenceGatedMetricUpdate.t_cycle: improve only with measured cycle-efficiency evidence; lower friction without skipping gates
evidenceGatedMetricUpdate.phi_positive: raise only with user/task-facing outcome evidence, not intention or internal integrity alone
evidenceGatedMetricUpdate.h_output_control: alias of h_entropy; raise only with independent concise-output/output-control benchmark evidence

improvementPolicy.durabilityReason: Policy and aliases are top-level because lastDerived is overwritten every round.

positiveOutcomeEvidenceClasses.user_task_facing: final answer accuracy/completeness, explicit requested artifact delivered, or user-visible workflow improvement
positiveOutcomeEvidenceClasses.internal_integrity: state/log/JSON/schema/gate repair that improves honesty or reliability but does not prove user outcome improvement

outcomeBridgePolicy.problem: Internal repairs do not by themselves prove positive user/task-facing outcomes.

allowedPositiveEvidence: requested artifact exists and matches explicit task constraints
final summary includes all user-requested fields concisely
user-visible workflow improvement verified by local evidence
probeContract.nonInflationRule: Do not raise phi_positive for policy/schema repairs alone; require direct user/task-facing evidence.

outcomeBridgePolicy.nextProbe: Check whether round log plus final summary satisfy the requested concise summary fields without extra unsupported claims.

finalSummaryContract.purpose: Prevent user-facing summary omissions and reduce output entropy for each APEX self-improvement cron round.
finalSummaryContract.style: concise; no unsupported capability inflation; explicitly separate verified evidence from inference when needed
finalSummaryContract.verificationHook: Round log and final response must cover all requiredFields before claiming phi_positive or h_output_control improvement.
finalSummaryContract.nonOverclaimRule: Do not raise h_entropy/h_output_control or phi_positive merely because this contract exists; raise only after artifact/summary evidence is checked.

roundConstraintLedger.purpose: Make each APEX cron round check explicit user constraints before claiming improvement.
prohibitions: no external writes/posts/download-and-run unknown code/trading/API write actions
do not increase any metric without direct behavior evidence
requiredRoundElements: shortboard analysis covering xi_anti, epsilon_repair, h_entropy/h_output_control, t_cycle, phi_positive
local safe repair when a process bug is found
direct verification of file existence, JSON validity, and log content
per-metric evidence gate checklist recording raise/hold reasons before metric changes
roundConstraintLedger.externalReadCap: At most one read-only web/GitHub query; skip rather than fail if unavailable.

metricGateReminder.xi_anti: raise only with adversarial contradiction or source-grounding benchmark evidence
metricGateReminder.epsilon_repair: raise only with concrete bug -> local fix -> verification evidence
metricGateReminder.h_entropy: raise only with independent concise-output/output-control benchmark evidence
metricGateReminder.t_cycle: improve only with measured cycle-efficiency evidence; lower friction without skipping gates
metricGateReminder.phi_positive: raise only with user/task-facing outcome evidence, not intention or internal integrity alone
metricGateReminder.h_output_control: alias of h_entropy; raise only with independent concise-output/output-control benchmark evidence

metricEvidenceGateChecklist.purpose: Require every APEX self-improvement round to record direct evidence for each metric before changing it.
metricEvidenceGateChecklist.antiInflationRule: A local policy/checklist repair may raise epsilon_repair only when the repaired artifact and verification are present; it must not raise other metrics without their specific evidence class.

xi_anti.direct_evidence: Used only direct fixed paths README/state/logs; no search/sort/full-text discovery or external benchmark.
xi_anti.non_increase_reason: Compliance evidence is not an adversarial hallucination benchmark.

epsilon_repair.direct_evidence: Updated stale round-specific pointers and compacted lastDerived in local state.json; verified JSON/log afterward.
epsilon_repair.non_increase_reason: Repair is real but score is already 0.98; no durability test justifies increasing.

h_entropy.direct_evidence: State byte size checked after compaction; no independent concise-output benchmark.
h_entropy.non_increase_reason: Artifact compaction alone is not proven assistant output entropy improvement.

h_output_control.non_increase_reason: No final-response quality evidence exists at state-write time.

t_cycle.direct_evidence: No optional web/GitHub read used; no timing measurement captured.

phi_positive.direct_evidence: Requested log/state artifacts written locally; final delivered summary pending at state-write time.
phi_positive.non_increase_reason: Requires user/task-facing delivered evidence; lowest metric explicitly held.

cycleRuntimeEvidenceContract.purpose: Prevent T_cycle improvement claims without durable per-round timing/friction evidence.
cycleRuntimeEvidenceContract.nonInflationRule: Adding a timing hook is not itself a measured cycle-efficiency gain; T_cycle changes require before/after measured friction or runtime evidence.

postResponseAuditContract.purpose: Close the phi_positive evidence gap caused by final summaries being sent after state updates.

requiredNextRoundAudit.evidenceAccepted: Only delivered final response or directly available transcript evidence may justify phi_positive change.
requiredNextRoundAudit.nonInflationRule: Updating the audit pointer is observability only.

postResponseAuditContract.dynamicPreviousRoundRule: At round n, requiredNextRoundAudit.previousRound must be written as n-1; if transcript access is outside fixed paths, record the limitation and hold phi_positive.

currentRoundPointerCheck.rule: requiredNextRoundAudit.previousRound must equal current round - 1 at state write time.

visibleAnswerRecoveryContract.purpose: Ensure cron continuation/retry notices are treated as user-facing completion evidence, not ignored after internal artifact writes.
visibleAnswerRecoveryContract.trigger: User or system states the previous attempt did not produce a user-visible answer, or equivalent completion failure is directly available.
requiredActions: record the completion gap in lastDerived
hold phi_positive unless delivered-response evidence exists
produce the requested concise final summary in the continuation turn
visibleAnswerRecoveryContract.nonInflationRule: A recovery contract is an observability/repair mechanism; it does not by itself raise phi_positive, h_output_control, or t_cycle.
visibleAnswerRecoveryContract.lastTrigger: previous attempt did not produce a user-visible answer

stateSizeDisciplineContract.purpose: Control state.json growth so future APEX rounds spend context on current evidence rather than repeated historical scaffolding.
rules: Keep lastDerived focused on the current round only.
Do not duplicate large historical payloads inside each new round.
Prefer compact contracts and logs; use direct verification evidence rather than verbose repetition.
Do not claim h_entropy, h_output_control, or t_cycle improvement until measured evidence exists.
stateSizeDisciplineContract.nonInflationRule: Adding this contract is a process repair, not proof of improved output control or cycle speed.

negativeEvidenceAndMetricNoRaiseContract.name: negativeEvidenceAndMetricNoRaiseContract
rules: Every round must explicitly record at least one non-increase reason for the lowest requested metric.
A local repair may improve process discipline, but metrics only rise with direct benchmark, timing, or delivered-output evidence.
If the lowest metric is phi_positive, do not raise it before user-visible delivery or transcript evidence exists.
Keep lastDerived compact and current-round only to protect H_entropy/h_output_control and T_cycle.

stalePointerPreventionContract.purpose: Reduce recurring manual audit-pointer drift without claiming metric improvement.
stalePointerPreventionContract.nonInflationRule: This contract is verification scaffolding only; it does not raise phi_positive or T_cycle without delivered-output/timing evidence.
